positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Focus on towering, bioluminescent flora with intricate leaf patterns and glowing mycelium networks on the forest floor. The main subject is a central, majestic, stylized celestial whale arching through the canopy. Use deep indigo, brilliant turquoise, electric lavender, and neon lime green for the color palette. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau organic lines and modern synthwave aesthetics, creating high contrast against deep space blacks. Emphasize clean, bold silhouettes and geometric simplification of the natural forms. Composition must be perfectly centered and designed to wrap cleanly around a garment. Flat graphic design quality, high detail, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, signature, celebrity, bad anatomy, low detail, grainy, oversaturated, messy, realism
